perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a white construction helmet and a yellow high-visibility safety vest is centered in the frame, speaking enthusiastically to someone off-camera. She is in a retail environment with clothing racks visible in the background. (2) The camera switches between close-up shots of her face and medium shots as she gestures with her hands, pointing at the surroundings. She maintains a smiling, energetic expression throughout. (3) The video concludes with her pointing directly at the camera with a cheerful smile.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop background music starts immediately. (2) A female voice speaks in a friendly and high-pitched tone in Mandarin, responding to an off-screen male voice who asks a question. (3) Subtle background ambient noise of a busy retail environment is audible under the music and vocals. (4) Short chime sound effects are used to emphasize text appearances.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: "Spent over 1 million" in large, red-outlined yellow characters appearing over the woman's face at the start. (2) Functional: White subtitles at the bottom translating the dialogue about a pop-up store in the Xinyi District Dream Plaza. (3) Decorative: Various variety-show style captions like "Must support!", "So sweet!", and "Made in Taiwan" appearing in bubbles or with graphic borders.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Explanation of Store Concept -> Call to Action/Value Proposition

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character onscreen; 1 male hand briefly visible pointing towards the camera from offscreen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white hard hat, a yellow/blue safety vest over a green dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Interior of a clothing store or department store with wooden shelves, clothing racks, and red plastic baskets.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a physical pop-up shop for an e-commerce brand. The creator uses the high cost of the store as a 'hook' to demonstrate commitment to her customers, inviting them to come and touch the quality of the 'Made in Taiwan' products in person.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker identifies as the 'boss' or owner of the brand and is promoting her own physical store opening.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Wearing construction safety gear while in a finished retail environment (signifying 'work in progress' or 'labor of love').
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of high-contrast text and variety-show editing style is typical of Taiwanese social media marketing for young entrepreneurs.
